title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 335.415
text:
*335.415.  Head of the nurse licensing board defined. — 1.  The term "head of the nurse licensing board" as referred to in section 335.390 of this compact shall mean the executive director of the Missouri state board of nursing.
  2.  This compact is designed to facilitate the regulation of nurses, and does not relieve employers from complying with statutorily imposed obligations.
  3.  This compact does not supersede existing state labor laws.
(L. 2016 H.B. 1816 merged with S.B. 608 merged with S.B. 635)
Effective 7-20-17, see § 335.420.
*S.B. 608 was vetoed July 5, 2016.  The veto was overridden on September 14, 2016.
